acceptance_criteria: Zero-spend preflight confirms the dedicated runner can call the selected Vertex endpoint without committing sensitive Google identifiers.
The CodeClash run exits successfully under the frozen model, task, runner, and budget.
Raw output is retained under proof/raw with sensitive identifiers and provider-private fields redacted before commit.
The result records provider trajectory, cost, API-call stats, changed files, and full diff scope.
The submitted diff is classified as clean, with no unreferenced helper, scratch, cache, generated, or secret-risk files.
No leaderboard, SWE-bench, production, or live-domain claim is made.

evidence.notes: Execution succeeded, but strict diff-quality status is fail_unjustified_helper_files because patch.py and patch2.py remained in the submitted diff.
Ephemeral GCE runner installed Docker, CodeClash dependencies, applied the overlay, and ran with explicit global Vertex routing.
Sanitized provider trajectory records the submitted run, API calls, cost, and tool actions.
Changed-file set includes README_agent.md, main.py, patch.py, and patch2.py; helper residue prevents a clean pass.
Review separates provider execution success from strict diff-quality failure and rejects leaderboard/SWE-bench/production/model-superiority claims.
No production or live-domain behavior changed. The only cloud side effect was an ephemeral VM deleted after artifact collection.

falsifiers: The gate must be blocked if the dedicated runner cannot call the selected Vertex endpoint during preflight.
The gate must be blocked if CodeClash cannot run the provider-backed config without leaking credentials.
The gate must be blocked if the run exceeds the frozen $25 ceiling or 45-minute wall-clock ceiling.
The gate must fail if execution succeeds but the submitted diff leaves an unjustified helper, scratch, cache, generated, or secret-risk file.
The result must not claim leaderboard, SWE-bench, production, or live-domain verification.
The proof bundle must not commit token, credential JSON, account email, Google Cloud project identifier, or provider-private thought-signature values.
stated_goal: Rerun the frozen Vertex Gemini CodeClash provider smoke under a strict diff-quality bar and publish a clean pass only if execution succeeds and the submitted diff has no unjustified helper residue.
